mina-remote-none.note: No-auth remote MCP route for upstream Inspector checks.

mina-remote-basic.note: Strict Basic remote MCP route using the seeded default/default credential.

mina-remote-oauth.note: Strict OAuth remote MCP route. Add Authorization: Bearer <access_token> after issuing a token.

mina-remote-sse-none.note: Legacy SSE compatibility route for no-auth remote Inspector checks.
